cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Mortality and Immortality
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bella grapples with the disparity between her human aging and Edward's immortality, leading to a growing determination to close that gap through transformation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: shocked by vision of her aged self beside ageless Edward
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: commits to becoming a vampire to achieve equal footing with Edward
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Edward still resists her transformation, creating ongoing tension

cross_scene_arcs.title: Edward's Emotional Dependence and Bella's Burden
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Edward's life-or-death emotional dependence on Bella escalates from private confession to suicidal action, forcing Bella to take responsibility for his survival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Edward reveals he would have died if Bella had died
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bella physically stops Edward from provoking the Volturi, saving his life
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Bella remains central to Edward's emotional stability, creating imbalance in their relationship

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Grief and Self-Destructive Risk
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After Edward leaves, Bella spirals into emotional collapse and uses dangerous behavior to trigger visions of him, equating pain with proof of their love.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally shattered and physically collapsed after Edward ends their relationship
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: deliberately jumps from a cliff to summon Edward's apparition, finding relief in the risk
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her reliance on self-endangerment for emotional validation remains unaddressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reclaiming Agency in the Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bella shifts from passive grief to active intervention, asserting control over her fate and demanding equal say in her transformation and relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: learns Edward is about to die because he believes she is dead
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: positions herself as the authority over her own transformation, halting a fight between Edward and Jacob
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Edward will accept her decision to become a vampire remains uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Love and Mortality: Edward's Fear of Damning Bella
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Edward resists turning Bella into a vampire due to his belief that doing so would damn her soul, creating ongoing tension between his love for her and his moral convictions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Edward refuses to transform Bella because he believes vampires have no souls and would risk her eternal damnation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Edward admits he cannot live without Bella but still opposes her transformation, showing unresolved conflict over her choice.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Bella's desire to become a vampire continues to clash with Edward's ethical concerns about her soul.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jealousy and Rivalry: Edward's Struggle with Jacob
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Edward shows increasing discomfort with Jacob's closeness to Bella, reacting with jealousy and tension that escalates into physical protectiveness when Bella is threatened.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Edward resents Jacob giving Bella a birthday gift and reacts with visible irritation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Edward physically shields Bella during a crisis, reinforcing his role as protector while maintaining underlying tension with Jacob.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Edward struggles to accept Bella's autonomy in friendships, particularly with Jacob.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Self-Destruction and Survival: Edward's Crisis Without Bella
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Edward reveals and acts on a pattern of self-destructive intent when he believes Bella is lost, culminating in a failed suicide attempt that shifts to renewed will to live upon her return.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Edward admits he would have provoked the Volturi to die if Bella had died during the James incident.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Edward abandons his suicide attempt upon learning Bella is alive and recommit to protecting her.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Edward's emotional stability remains deeply tied to Bella's presence.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protective Instinct and Defiance: Edward Against the Volturi
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Edward shifts from seeking death at the Volturi's hands to actively resisting them when Bella appears, ultimately confronting their enforcers to protect her despite severe consequences.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Edward attempts to provoke the Volturi into killing him by exposing himself to sunlight.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Edward physically attacks a Volturi guard and endures torture to defend Bella, showing full reversal from self-destruction to defiance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The Volturi remain a threat, and Edward's actions have placed them in direct opposition.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Enduring Bond Across Time and Age
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Edward's love for Bella persists across visions of aging, separation, and moral conflict, highlighting the emotional weight of their unequal lifespans and deep interdependence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Edward is seen in a vision kissing aged Bella's hand, symbolizing his eternal presence beside her mortality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: After reuniting, Edward confesses he has no way to live without her, affirming his emotional dependence despite their differences.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The fundamental imbalance between Bella's mortality and Edward's immortality remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jacob's growing affection for Bella
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob's feelings for Bella evolve from quiet care to open emotional expression, marked by gestures, physical affection, and direct pleas to stay, despite her romantic commitment to Edward.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jacob expresses care through a thoughtful gift, signaling emotional investment.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob openly declares his love and accepts Bella's departure, heartbroken but resigned.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jacob continues to love Bella despite knowing she will become a vampire, leaving his emotional recovery uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating conflict with Edward
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tension between Jacob and Edward intensifies from silent rivalry to open hostility, culminating in physical confrontation over Bella's fate.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Edward resents Jacob's connection with Bella; Jacob stands his ground in a tense standoff.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob lunges at Edward upon learning of Bella's planned transformation, only restrained by her intervention.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The threat of future violence remains if Jacob perceives Edward endangering Bella.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jacob's transformation and role as protector
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob transitions from a supportive friend to an active werewolf protector, revealing his supernatural identity and defending Bella from both external threats and internal pack pressure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jacob supports Bella's risky motorcycle project, becoming her partner in defiance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob fully embraces his role as a werewolf, protecting Bella from pack hostility and vampire threats.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jacob struggles with the emotional burden of his powers and the risk of losing control.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Breakdown and redefinition of Jacob and Bella's relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob and Bella's bond shifts from close friendship to emotional rupture and partial reconciliation, marked by rejection, separation, and lingering intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bella rejects Jacob's deeper feelings, reaffirming only friendship while he grows physically ill.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob pleads with Bella to stay, acknowledging his love before accepting her departure.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Their connection remains emotionally charged, but no path exists for reconciliation as Bella chooses Edward.
